title: Add option for done and not done to status column list in automations
excerpt: It would be very useful to have an option in the list of statuses to pick up the item completion based on the status column settings.  Example: On the list where you select Anything or a specific status, add an option th…

posts.author: dapullia (David Pulliam)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be very useful to have an option in the list of statuses to pick up the item completion based on the status column settings. Example: On the list where you select Anything or a specific status, add an option that reads the column settings for the statuses checked as done as well as an option for the inverse of this. That way you effectively have a Move if Done, Move if Not Done or do this action when done or do this action when not done.
